title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.388 - DeSoto Railroad Employees Memorial Highway designated for a portion of Highway 110 in Jefferson County
text:
227.388.  DeSoto Railroad Employees Memorial Highway designated for a portion of Highway 110 in Jefferson County. — The portion of Highway 110 from U.S. Highway 67 to Highway 21 within the county of the first classification with more than one hundred ninety-eight thousand but fewer than one hundred ninety-nine thousand two hundred inhabitants shall be designated the "DeSoto Railroad Employees Memorial Highway".  Costs for such designation shall be paid by private donations.
(L. 2007 H.B. 56)
